description_long: This is a pair of sturdy, high-ankle work boots with a tan leather upper and a darker brown padded collar. The boots feature metal eyelets and yellow-brown laces arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern. The soles are thick, rugged, and dark brown, designed for traction and durability, likely made of rubber with a lugged tread. The stitching is visible along the seams, adding both reinforcement and a subtle decorative element. The boots appear clean and unworn, with no visible scuffs or dirt. These boots are suitable for urban environments, providing both protection and comfort for the wearer.
description: A pair of tan high-ankle work boots with brown padded collars, criss-cross laces, and thick lugged rubber soles. The boots are clean, sturdy, and designed for durability and comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan leather upper, brown padded collar, metal eyelets, and thick lugged sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the criss-cross lacing, rounded toe, and symmetrical design of both boots.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the boots with visible stitching and sole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the brown padded collars, heel structure, and back seam of the boots.
